title: Dataset for: Development and evaluation of control materials for nucleic acid-based detection of Listeria monocytogenes in milk
author: Marinček, Pia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains raw dPCR data associated with the manuscript: “Development and evaluation of control materials for nucleic acid-based detection of Listeria monocytogenes in milk”. 
 Data are organized to allow reproduction of the analyses presented in the manuscript.
steps_raw:
